capabilities: Implement reflection loops to enhance reasoning by iteratively critiquing and refining outputs, ensuring improved decision-making.

procedure.action: Initialize the reasoning process by setting up a logging mechanism to capture all decision points and outputs for subsequent critique and refinement using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Critique the initial output by applying a predefined set of heuristics and rules; log discrepancies and potential improvements to a structured feedback repository using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Refine the output by applying transformations based on logged feedback; ensure changes are traceable by maintaining a version history with git commit messages using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Score the refinement by running a suite of automated tests; assert that all critical tests pass with a success rate of >95% before proceeding to the next iteration.
Decide on iteration by comparing the current output against a baseline; if the improvement metric exceeds 10%, log the decision to iterate further, else finalize the output.

summary: Implement reflection loops in reasoning processes to iteratively critique and refine outputs, improving decision-making effectiveness.
title: Reflection Loop Implementation for Enhanced Reasoning

failureConditions: Suboptimal decision-making when feedback is not logged correctly, causing missed opportunities for refinement.
Increased error rates when refinement steps introduce new issues, causing regression in reasoning quality.
Inefficient processing when iteration decisions are not based on quantitative metrics, causing unnecessary cycles.
metrics: that all critical tests pass with a success rate of >95% before proceeding to the next iteration
